from openpyxl import Workbook

    right=Side(style='thin'),
    top=Side(style='thin'),
    bottom=Side(style='thin')
)

# Row 1: Headers

months = ["Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr", "May", "Jun", "Total"]
for i, month in enumerate(months, start=2):
    cell = ws.cell(row=1, column=i, value=month)
